threads.title: Create Gu Huaizhang character board
threads.notes: The background thread produced v001, v002, and a stricter v003 candidate. The parent thread selected a later direct-generation candidate as the canonical final after visual QC.

retry_notes: v001 established the older southern teacher identity and three-state board, but retained complete circular sun-moon or astrolabe-like motifs that could be read as a redesigned Zhaoming badge.
v002 reduced robe medallions but pulled in bottom reference-scene panels and circular emblem-like geometry.
v003 improved the board structure but still contained too many ring and key-like hardwares that risked reading as a new symbol system.

The accepted final was generated in the parent thread with stricter constraints: no new badge, no clean sun-moon emblem, no public chest mark, and Zhaoming continuity expressed through color hierarchy, broken route-line embroidery, red knots, damp stains, scroll tools, and non-symbolic aged hardware.
results.validation_summary: Final PNG copied to the canonical asset path; v001-v003 retained as rejected history. Visual review confirmed three full-body states, older severe teacher identity, southern red-line scroll system, humid old-empire palette, complete role-specific clothing, and no readable text, UI, watermark, or redesigned faction badge. Natural scroll-cylinder end caps remain as prop structure rather than emblem design.
